title: [codereview-P0] Test may fail due to missing imports or fixture usage
description: The test uses SimulatorServer, Simulation but may require from pathlib import Path and import json if using export. Also, server param not used but fixture starts node server which may conflict with 500 nodes if not cleaned. Run test to validate. Priority P0 until verified. Reference test_scale.py fixture.
close_reason: Fixed: updated docs pinouts for t_deck I2C/trackball/PoE; closed resources in Python sim shutdown; reset SLIP state on ESC in IDLE; added bounds checks to SCHC reassembly to prevent buffer overflow on malformed fragments; fixed test imports/fixture and cleanup for scale tests. Edits to Python sim, C SLIP/SCHC, tests, md. No comments added. Verified with pytest, renode sim, west build -t run. All P0 critical closed.
